mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_SYS_ROLE.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO SYS_ROLE( ID, NAME, PARENT_ID, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, ENABLED_FLAG, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 , #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE , #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_ROLE SET NAME=#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENT_ID=#{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DESCRIPTION=#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS=#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATE_DATE=SYSDATE WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYS_ROLE SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT R.* FROM SYS_USER_ROLE_REL RE,SYS_ROLE R WHERE RE.USER_ID=#{id} AND RE.ROLE_ID=R.ID
